operators.metadata: 最小运动事实；不暗示意志。
同一条轨迹上的加速、减速、停顿和重新释放。
operators.collisionNote: sweep subdivides at every envelope key

operators.metadata: 系统读取的是某个时刻的玩家，不是持续拥有玩家。
operators.determinism: target comes from authoritative sampled player trace
operators.collisionNote: telegraph must expose lock instant and cone

operators.metadata: 规则只改口一次，因此玩家可以记住它。
归属感是暂时的；释放后才成为威胁。
operators.update: orbit emitter until release; inherit tangent plus release heading
operators.determinism: phase derives from spawn ordinal and seed
operators.collisionNote: orbit and released segments are separate swept primitives

operators.metadata: 凝视会追随，但其算力和转向能力并不无限。
operators.determinism: fixed-rate target samples; no render-frame dependence
operators.collisionNote: warning cone expands by maximum turn budget

operators.metadata: 一个信号复制成多条责任链，子代继承来源。
operators.update: parent cancels; spawn symmetric children with inherited sourceId
operators.determinism: child order is clockwise and stable
operators.collisionNote: parent collision disables before children arm

operators.metadata: 空间被制度化为可通过与不可通过的列。
operators.update: spawn lane lattice excluding declared opening; apply lateral drift
operators.collisionNote: opening width is measured after projectile radius

operators.metadata: 穿过边界时，同一对象被另一套规则重新解释。
operators.update: on first seam crossing apply transform and mark transformed
operators.collisionNote: both sides of discontinuity are sampled on crossing tick

operators.metadata: 旧路径不是装饰，而是下一次危险的输入。
operators.determinism: points are serialized gameplay data, never inferred from animation

operators.metadata: 两个系统共享空间却不同意现在是什么时候。
operators.update: active when xor(gateA(t),gateB(t)); intersection when both
operators.determinism: both clocks derive from integer gameplay ticks
operators.collisionNote: collision state changes only on crossed tick boundaries

operators.metadata: 偏置由 pattern 自己声明；天气事件绝不能移动弹体。
operators.determinism: pattern-local vector is sampled on fixed gameplay ticks; weather RNG is forbidden
